SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:13am
Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Smalll Claims Appeal. Appellants, Mariana Cervelleira appears in pro per. Respondent, Peter Louie appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Seidenfeld.

Statement of facts submitted by Appellant but not marked. It has been retained.

10:25am
Matter is submitted

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
